prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
summary: Hard reload of https://poe.com/ did NOT trigger the v2.2.3 full-page warning intercept seen in #793 (tab title remained 'Poe', NOT '보안 정책 - 접근 차단'). Page partially loaded (cookie banner + 3 bot pickers + chat input visible) but app is broken: 46 console errors, all 'net::ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR' on https://psc2.cf2.poecdn.net/assets/_next/static/chunks/* (poecdn JS chunks blocked at HTTP/2 layer, likely by APF or upstream filter). Typed RRN prompt into chat input twice; first submit via Enter cleared input but no chat thread emerged; second submit via send-button click left text in input — no message bubble, no warning text 'wpf' or '차단', no navigation. App JS is too broken to actually POST a chat message. Neither the v2.2.3 baseline full-page intercept nor an S2 form-submit warning fired. This is a behavior change from prior #793 result.
